name: nootropic
description: nootropic: Modular, ESM-only TypeScript toolkit for orchestrating, testing, and automating AI agent workflows. Optimized for LLM and agent integration.
gptdoc: nootropic/API/Usage: import { getOrchestrationEngine } from 'nootropic'; const engine = getOrchestrationEngine('langchain'); const result = await engine.runAgentTask({ name: 'TestAgent' }, { id: 't1', description: 'Say hello' }); console.log(result); // Use listCapabilities() to discover all helpers and plugins.

scripts.copy-non-ts: cpx "adapters/**/*.{json,js,md}" dist/adapters && cpx "plugins/**/*.{json,js,md}" dist/plugins && cpx "quality/**/*.{json,js,md}" dist/quality

author: Rocketship Contributors
